tips: Consistency beats intensity — showing up every day matters more than one perfect session.
Rest is part of training. Muscles grow during recovery, not during the workout itself.
Progressive overload is the key — add a little more weight or one extra rep each week.
Hydrate before, during and after — even mild dehydration cuts performance by up to 10%.
Focus on form first. Perfect technique with lighter weight beats sloppy reps every time.
Sleep is your secret weapon. 7-9 hours accelerates muscle repair and hormone balance.
Warm up for 5 minutes — it reduces injury risk and improves your session quality.
Track every set. What gets measured gets improved.
Compound lifts first — squats, deadlifts, presses — then isolation exercises.
A bad workout is still better than no workout. Just show up.

auth.data_note:
Your data stays on-device first.
Syncs to server when online.
auth.password_too_short: Password must be at least 8 characters
auth.generic_error: Something went wrong. Please try again.

onboarding.step_name_sub: We’ll use this to personalize your experience.
onboarding.step_unit_sub: You can change this anytime in Profile.
onboarding.step_weight_sub: Optional — we’ll track your progress from here.
onboarding.step_sex_sub: Optional — used for BMI and body composition tracking.
onboarding.step_height_sub: Optional — needed to calculate your BMI.
onboarding.step_goal_sub: Optional — helps you stay focused and motivated.
onboarding.step_language_sub: Choose your language. You can change it anytime in Profile.
onboarding.tour_home_desc: See today’s plan, your workout streak, 30-day activity heatmap, and recent sessions — all in one place.
onboarding.tour_exercises_desc: 610 exercises. Search by muscle group, watch video demos, track history, and add any exercise to your plan.
onboarding.tour_planner_desc: Build your weekly training schedule. Set exercises per day with target sets, reps, weight, and rest time.
onboarding.tour_progress_desc: Log your body weight and review strength PRs for every exercise. Watch your gains over time with charts.
onboarding.tour_profile_desc: Set your fitness goals, switch between kg and lbs, enable rest timer notifications, and export your data.

dashboard.no_workouts_yet:
No workouts yet.
Start your first session above!
dashboard.gpt_banner_desc: Let AI read your profile, pick exercises, and build a personalised plan saved directly to your account.
dashboard.install_title: Add FitTrack to your Home Screen
dashboard.install_android_desc: Install for offline access and a better experience.
dashboard.no_badges_yet: Complete your first workout to start earning badges!

planner.title: My
planner.subtitle: Create a weekly plan to organize your training.
planner.gpt_empty_desc: ChatGPT reads your profile, goals and fitness level, then picks the right exercises from our 610-exercise library and builds a personalised weekly plan — saved directly to your account.
planner.gpt_how_step1_desc: Tap the button below to open the FitTrack Planner GPT in ChatGPT. A free ChatGPT account is all you need.
planner.gpt_how_step2_desc: ChatGPT will ask permission to access your FitTrack account. This lets it read your profile and save the plan directly here.
planner.gpt_how_step3_desc: The AI asks about your goals, experience, available days and equipment. Takes about 2 minutes.
planner.gpt_how_step4_desc: When ChatGPT finishes, your plan is saved to your account and set as active — come back here and it will be ready.
planner.step2_sub: Tap the days you will train. Rest days are unchecked.
planner.step3_sub: Name each training day and set the default rest time.
planner.delete_plan_message: This will permanently remove this plan and all its days and exercises.
planner.delete_active_plan_message: This will permanently remove your active plan and all its days and exercises. You need a plan to start a workout — you can create a new one afterwards.
planner.no_training_days: No training days in your active plan.
planner.remove_day_message: Remove "{{name}}" and its {{count}} exercise(s) from your plan?

workout.sets_not_completed_message: You have {{count}} incomplete set. Skip to the next exercise anyway?
workout.sets_not_completed_message_plural: You have {{count}} incomplete sets. Skip to the next exercise anyway?
workout.finish_workout_message: You have {{count}} incomplete set. Finish and save what you’ve done?
workout.finish_workout_message_plural: You have {{count}} incomplete sets. Finish and save what you’ve done?
workout.add_set_message: Save this extra set to the plan for future workouts too?
workout.remove_set_message: Also reduce sets in your plan for future workouts?
workout.remove_exercise_message: Remove from your plan for future workouts too?
workout.no_exercises: No exercises loaded. This is a free workout.
workout.tap_anywhere_skip: Tap anywhere or skip to continue
workout.no_history: No history yet. Log your first set to start tracking.

progress.title: Your
progress.subtitle: Track your evolution over time
progress.no_weight_data: No weight data yet. Log your first weigh-in below.
progress.no_sessions: Complete workouts to see your progress stats here.
progress.log_weight_for_bmi: Log your weight above to see BMI over time.
progress.bmi_underweight: Your BMI is below 18.5. WHO recommends consulting a healthcare provider about healthy weight gain strategies.
progress.bmi_overweight: Your BMI is above 25. WHO recommends regular physical activity and a balanced diet to reach a healthy weight.
progress.bmi_obese_1: Your BMI indicates obesity (class I). WHO recommends medical guidance for safe weight management.
progress.bmi_obese_2: Your BMI indicates obesity (class II). Please consult a healthcare provider.
progress.bmi_obese_3: Your BMI indicates severe obesity. Please seek medical advice.

pr.title: Personal
pr.subtitle: {{count}} exercises tracked
pr.empty: Complete workouts to see your personal records here.

sessions.title: All
sessions.delete_message: This workout session will be permanently deleted. This cannot be undone.
sessions.no_sets_in_session: No sets were logged in this session.

profile.title: Profile &
profile.delete_account_warning: This will permanently delete your account and all your data — workouts, plans, progress and records. This cannot be undone.
profile.delete_account_error: Failed to delete account. Please try again.
profile.weight_unit_note: Affects workout tracking and progress displays.
profile.enter_height_bmi: Enter your height and log a weight to see your BMI.
profile.notif_ios_suffix: and the app added to your Home Screen.
profile.delete_all_message: This will permanently delete all sessions, sets, weight logs, goals, and plans. This cannot be undone.
profile.fittrack_gpt_desc: Your AI personal trainer — reads your profile and goals, browses 610 exercises, and builds a personalised plan saved directly to your account.
profile.gpt_open_detail: Tap the button below. You’ll need a ChatGPT account (free or Plus).
profile.gpt_signin_detail: ChatGPT will redirect you to the FitTrack login page. Enter your FitTrack email and password — the same credentials you use here.
profile.gpt_authorize_detail: After signing in, tap “Allow” to grant the GPT access to your account. This only happens once.
profile.gpt_answer_detail: The GPT will ask about your goals, available equipment, training days per week, and experience level. Answer as best you can.
profile.gpt_review_detail: The GPT presents the full plan before saving — review the days and exercises, then tell it to go ahead.
profile.gpt_saved: Plan saved — check the Planner tab
profile.gpt_saved_detail: Your new plan appears automatically in the Planner. It’s set as your active plan and ready to use.
profile.footer_note: FitTrack PWA · 610 exercises · Local-first · Works offline
profile.toast_save_error: Could not save — check your connection

sync.errors: {{count}} item(s) failed to sync. Tap to retry.

consistency.name: Consistent
consistency.desc: 4 or more workouts in a week
